steps.title: Target a difference
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize how Dhaka muslin and sheeting muslin differ. The notes provide paired contrasts: handmade versus machine-made and extremely fine weave versus coarse weave.

steps.title: Choose the contrast sentence
steps.content: B only says both are types of muslin. C discusses uses of muslins generally. D describes only sheeting muslin, so it does not compare the two fabrics. The sentence contrasting production method and weave best meets the goal. The answer is A.
